ast.name: log
ast.source: Paste Reformatter plugin skipping paste: cursor is inside a code block
ast.target: 粘贴格式化器插件跳过粘贴：光标位于代码块内

ast.name: log
ast.source: Default paste behavior overridden by Paste Reformatter plugin
ast.target: 默认粘贴行为被粘贴格式化器插件覆盖

ast.name: log
ast.source: Paste Reformatter plugin did not handle paste, allowing default behavior
ast.target: 粘贴格式化器插件未处理粘贴，允许默认行为

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Alter the behavior of the default paste action to reformat pasted content.
ast.target: 更改默认粘贴操作的行为以重新格式化粘贴的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Display a notice when pasted content is reformatted.
ast.target: 当粘贴的内容被重新格式化时显示通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how the HTML content is processed before being converted to Markdown.
ast.target: 控制HTML内容在转换为Markdown之前如何处理。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Control how the Markdown content is adjusted after HTML conversion or when pasted as plain text.
ast.target: 控制HTML转换后或作为纯文本粘贴时如何调整Markdown内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The maximum heading level to allow when reformatting pasted content (H1 is treated as disabled)
ast.target: 重新格式化粘贴内容时允许的最大标题级别（H1被视为禁用）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Preserve the heading hierarchy by cascading levels (e.g., H1→H2→H3 becomes H2→H3→H4 when max level is H2)
ast.target: 通过级联级别保留标题层次结构（例如，当最大级别为H2时，H1→H2→H3变为H2→H3→H4）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Cascade headings based on the current context (e.g., if cursor is in an H2 section, headings will start from H3)
ast.target: 根据当前上下文级联标题级别（例如，如果光标在H2部分，标题将从H3开始）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Collapse multiple consecutive blank lines into a single blank line
ast.target: 将多个连续的空行折叠为单个空行

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Clipboard does not contain HTML or plain text content.
ast.target: 剪贴板不包含HTML或纯文本内容。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error accessing clipboard. Try using regular paste instead.
ast.target: 访问剪贴板时出错。请尝试使用常规粘贴。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 已重新格式化粘贴的内容
